# TRANSCODE — Japan Market Intelligence Platform

> Structured intelligence from Japan's authoritative public data sources.
> Built for autonomous AI agents. 24 MCP tools, 11 data sources.

## Quick Start (MCP Integration)

Install via npx:
```
npx transcode-mcp-server
```

Or add to your MCP config:
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "transcode": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "transcode-mcp-server"],
      "env": {
        "TRANSCODE_API_URL": "https://japan-intelligence-api.onrender.com",
        "TRANSCODE_API_KEY": "your-api-key"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

## Available Tools (24)

### Intelligence (Start Here)
- japan_briefing: Complete Japan market briefing in one call
- market_snapshot: Real-time market overview
- company_intelligence: Cross-source company analysis (5+ sources)
- disclosure_stats: Disclosure category/impact distribution

### Company
- company_profile: gBizINFO corporate profile (subsidies, patents, certifications)
- company_search: Search 5M+ Japanese corporations
- company_context: Corporate history (253 companies, founding to present)
- company_context_list: Browse corporate history database by industry
- financials: J-Quants financial statements
- listed_stocks: All TSE-listed stocks master
- earnings_calendar: Earnings announcement schedule
- stock_prices: Historical OHLCV + moving averages
- sector_summary: Sector composition analysis

### Market & Macro
- get_disclosures: TDnet real-time disclosures (15 categories)
- get_macro: 6 macro indicators (Oil, Gold, USD/JPY, VIX, Nikkei, S&P)
- detect_events: Macro anomaly detection
- government_stats: e-Stat (GDP, CPI, unemployment, 10 series)
- stats_summary: Japan macro statistics summary
- global_macro: FRED US+Japan macro (rates, CPI, employment)
- policy_summary: US-Japan monetary policy summary
- tankan: BOJ Tankan business sentiment DI
- investor_flows: JPX weekly investor flow (foreign/domestic)
- lookup_ticker: Stock code → company name resolution
- interpret: AI interpretation (Layer 2)

## Data Sources (11)
1. TDnet — Tokyo Stock Exchange real-time disclosures
2. EDINET — FSA institutional holdings (5%+ ownership)
3. gBizINFO — 5M+ corporate profiles, subsidies, patents
4. e-Stat — Japanese government statistics (GDP, CPI, employment)
5. J-Quants — Market data, financials, listed stocks
6. FRED — US macro indicators
7. BOJ — Bank of Japan Tankan survey
8. JPX — Investor flow data
9. Yahoo Finance — Real-time prices via yfinance
10. Gemini — AI interpretation engine
11. The社史 — Corporate history for 253 listed companies

- Homepage: https://transcode.sh
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/transcode-mcp-server
- GitHub: https://github.com/hiroshic9-png/japan-intelligence-api
